task_objective: Fix the post-game BrowserUI dwell regression found in live steamdeck logs and publish a replacement development release.
tests_added: successful exit backup preserves the original backed_up result through completeStatus
controller supplies lifecycle_exit completion provenance and does not publish a generic lifecycle_exit has_backup
unavailable and stale handoffs do not complete an already completed backup twice
design_decisions: Keep the 900 ms timer and BrowserView ownership unchanged in autoSyncStatusSurface.
Route successful exit backups through completeStatus so resultStatus=backed_up and lifecycle_exit provenance reach the surface.
Make unmapped unavailable and stale handoff fallbacks no-ops because the successful backup result is now completed before handoff activation.
Preserve mapped Syncthing-unavailable warning publication and all polling behavior.

tdd_evidence.red: 2 focused failures proved missing completion provenance; 3 follow-up failures proved duplicate completion for unavailable/stale handoffs.
tdd_evidence.green: 85 focused controller, decision, and status-surface tests passed.

results.frontend_verify: 286 Vitest tests passed; typecheck, build, audit, and supply-chain checks passed
